scripts.build: cd apps/client && npm install --include=dev && npx vite@5.4.21 build && cd ../../ && cd apps/server && npm install --include=dev --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build
scripts.build:client: cd apps/client && npm install --include=dev && npx vite@5.4.21 build
scripts.build:server: cd apps/server && npm install --include=dev --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build
